docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JOANNE DESMOND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRUNCH LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JAN-08-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRUNCH LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CRUNCH LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY DESMOND, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUNCH LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESMOND, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUNCH LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESMOND, JOANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUNCH LLC $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
